findings.evidence: Grep hits: `CommonEnding.lean:38 theorem measure_eq_of_forall_univ_pi`, `:57 theorem conditionallyIIDWith_of_forall_rectangles`, `:76 theorem ConditionallyIIDWith.blockLaw_univ_pi`, `:87 theorem conditionallyIIDWith_iff_forall_rectangles`; roadmap lines 313-327 split `ProductKernel.lean` infrastructure from the de Finetti common ending, and `ConditionallyIIDWith` is defined in `Exchangeability/ConditionallyIID.lean:46`.
findings.fix: Move the finite-product measure extensionality lemma to `TauCeti/MeasureTheory/Measure/ProductKernel.lean` (or another MeasureTheory home) and the rectangle characterization/destructor API next to `ConditionallyIIDWith` in `TauCeti/Probability/Exchangeability/ConditionallyIID.lean` or an adjacent exchangeability API file; leave this file as the common-ending wrapper `conditional_iid_from_directing_measure`.
findings.issue: `measure_eq_of_forall_univ_pi`, `conditionallyIIDWith_of_forall_rectangles`, `ConditionallyIIDWith.blockLaw_univ_pi`, and `conditionallyIIDWith_iff_forall_rectangles` are generic infrastructure/API, not de Finetti-specific material, but are published from `Probability/DeFinetti/CommonEnding.lean`.

summary: The PR puts reusable product-measure and `ConditionallyIIDWith` rectangle API in the de Finetti common-ending file instead of their canonical earlier homes.
